domain.purpose: Cover current-user identity, collaborator listing, membership invitations, permission changes, and member removal across workspaces, rooms, and murals.

rules.rule: users:read and identity:read solve different problems. users:read is for listing and inspecting collaborators; identity:read is for resolving the calling user's own identity via getcurrentmember.
Identity lookup and collaborator listing must not be conflated.
updatemuralmemberpermissions takes userId in the PATH, not the body. This is not symmetric with updateroommemberpermissions, which takes userId and permission both in the body.
inviteuserstoworkspace requires the workspaces:write scope. This scope is not listed on Mural's scopes overview page (which predates the endpoint) — the endpoint reference page is authoritative.
Caller must be a workspace admin to use inviteuserstoworkspace.
For removemuralusers and removeroomusers, the body carries a userIds array. These are POST operations, not DELETE.
